chunks.text: IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constt. Petition No. D- 1463 of 2024 DATE OF HEARING ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE. FRESH CASE 1. For orders on CMA NO.5826/2024 (U/A)\ 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on CMA No.5827/2024 (Ex/A) 4. For hearing of main case. 07-03-2025 Mr. Muhammad Zubair Malik, Advocate for petitioner Mr. Zulifqar Ali Naich, AAG Sindh. ********** Through the instant petition, the petitioner seeks directions to respondents No.2&4 (Revenue Officials) to issue Sale Certificate in respect of property mentioned in para No.3 of the petition. Learned Assistant Advocate General points out that recently, the Senior Member Board of Revenue Sindh through Notification No. DD(E&I)/HQ/BOR/2024/302 dated 21.10.2024 has established a “Public Grievances Redressal Cell” under the aegis of the concerned Deputy Commissioner across Sindh. The cell is mandated to address public grievances pertaining to revenue matters, including mutation entries, sale certificates, Foti-Khata-Badal, demarcation of land, land partition and solvency Certificates. The establishment of this cell provides an alternate, effective and exhausted remedy for redressal of complaints related to revenue issued. Accordingly, instant petition is disposed of alongwith listed applications, leaving it open for the petitioner to avail the remedy delineated by the “Public Grievances Redressal Cell” as prescribed by the Notification; however, Public Grievances Redressal Cell, is directed to address the issue of the petitioner within a period of one month’s time from the receipt of this order. J U D G E J U D G E Naveed Ali
